tools.name: get_crystals_zodiac_sign
tools.description: Get healing crystals and gemstones associated with a specific zodiac sign. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Supports all 12 zodiac signs from Aries through Pisces. Perfect for personalized crystal recommendations based on astro

tools.name: get_crystals_chakra
tools.description: Get healing crystals and gemstones that resonate with a specific chakra energy center. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Supports all 7 primary chakras: Root, Sacral, Solar Plexus, Heart, Throat, Third Eye, and Crown. Essential

tools.name: get_crystals_element
tools.description: Get healing crystals and gemstones associated with a specific natural element. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Supports five elements: Earth, Water, Fire, Air, and Storm. Essential for elemental crystal selection, nature-based

tools.name: get_crystals_birthstone_month
tools.description: Get the traditional birthstone crystals for a given birth month. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Based on GIA-authoritative birthstone assignments. Perfect for birthday gift recommendations, personalized crystal suggestions, a

tools.name: get_crystals_search
tools.description: Search for healing crystals by keyword or name. Matches against crystal names, healing keywords, descriptions, and spiritual/emotional/physical meaning fields. Returns summary data for each crystal. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for full healing properties. Useful for building crystal search

tools.name: get_crystals_pairings_id
tools.description: Get crystals that pair well with a given crystal for enhanced healing combinations. Returns the source crystal along with its recommended companion stones and their properties. Essential for crystal grid building, healing combination recommendations, and crystal shop cross-sell features.

tools.name: post_crystals_daily
tools.description: Get the crystal of the day as a discovery teaser. Returns a deterministic crystal based on the current date (or a provided seed date), ensuring all users see the same crystal for any given day. Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for complete spiritual, emotional, and physical healing properties.

tools.name: get_crystals_random
tools.description: Get a randomly selected healing crystal as a discovery teaser. Returns a different crystal on each request (non-deterministic). Use the /crystals/:id detail endpoint for complete spiritual, emotional, and physical healing properties. Perfect for crystal discovery features, surprise crystal picks, cr

tools.name: get_crystals_colors
tools.description: List all unique crystal colors available in the database. Use these values with the color filter on GET /crystals to find crystals by color. Essential reference endpoint for building color-based crystal browsing, visual crystal pickers, and filtering UI.

tools.name: get_crystals_planets
tools.description: List all unique planetary associations available in the database. Use these values with the planet filter on GET /crystals to find crystals by ruling planet. Essential reference endpoint for astrology app builders who want to recommend crystals based on planetary placements in a birth chart.

tools.name: get_crystals
tools.description: Retrieve healing crystals and gemstones with pagination. Supports optional filtering by chakra, zodiac sign, element, color, or planet. Returns minimal summary fields per crystal. Use the detail endpoint for full healing properties. Perfect for building crystal explorer apps, healing stone guides, a

tools.name: get_crystals_id
tools.description: Get complete healing properties and metaphysical data for a specific crystal or gemstone. Returns spiritual, emotional, and physical healing interpretations along with chakra associations, zodiac connections, elemental properties, and crystal pairing recommendations. findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "crystals" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: post_crystals_daily · Private data: get_crystals_colors, get_crystals_planets · Public sink: post_crystals_daily.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: post_crystals_daily · Private data: get_crystals_colors, get_crystals_planets · Public sink: post_crystals_daily

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
